# Obfus-Tail
A build-time CSS obfuscation tool for TailwindCSS that transforms readable utility classes into optimized, obfuscated class names.

## Description
Transform your readable Tailwind utility classes into optimized, obfuscated CSS that protects your code, reduces bundle size, and enhances performance. Perfect for production applications where code protection and optimization matter.

## Key Features
- **Code Protection**: Hide your styling implementation from competitors
- **Bundle Optimization**: Reduce CSS bundle size with shorter class names
- **Performance Boost**: Faster parsing and improved page load times
- **Build-time Processing**: Automatic obfuscation during the build process
- **Zero Runtime Overhead**: No performance impact on your application
- **Dark/Light Theme Support**: Full theme switching with @custom-variant directive
- **File Scanning Control**: Configurable include/exclude patterns for precise file targeting
- **Skip Classes**: Preserve specific classes from obfuscation when needed

## Quick Start
1. Install dependencies: `npm install uuid && npm install -D glob @types/uuid`
2. Add the obfuscation script to your project
3. Update your build script: `"build": "node scripts/obfuscate-tailwind.js && next build"`
4. Import the generated CSS in your layout

## Documentation
- Getting Started: https://obfustail.ui-layouts.com/docs/getting-started
- How It Works: https://obfustail.ui-layouts.com/docs/how-it-works
- File Scanning: https://obfustail.ui-layouts.com/docs/file-scanning
- Skip Classes: https://obfustail.ui-layouts.com/docs/skip-classes
- Multi-Theme Support: https://obfustail.ui-layouts.com/docs/multi-theme

## Example Usage
```javascript
const CONFIG = {
  filesToScan: [
    "src/**/*.{jsx,tsx,js,ts,html}",
    "pages/**/*.{jsx,tsx}",
    "components/**/*.{jsx,tsx}",
    "app/**/*.{jsx,tsx}",
  ],
  excludePatterns: ["node_modules", ".next", "dist", ".git"],
  outputCssPath: "app/obfuscated-styles.css",
  mapFilePath: ".obfuscation-map.json",
  randomNameLength: 8,
};
```

## Theme Support
The tool automatically generates CSS with dark mode support:
```css
@custom-variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *));
```

## GitHub Repository
https://github.com/ui-layouts/Obfuscated-tailwindcss
